title: T-054 — Incident intake API + 24h corrective-action enforcement (V-QA-INCIDENT-001)
prompt:
# T-054 — Incident intake API

PRD: §11.6 V-QA-INCIDENT-001, §7.1 09-e-04, §12.1 outbox

## Goal
3 incident Server Actions: reportIncident, addCorrectiveAction, verifyIncident. Enforces V-QA-INCIDENT-001 (accident type → corrective_action within 24h, overdue→flag). Emits quality.incident.* outbox.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/src/server/quality/incident/actions.ts — 3 Server Actions.
2. reportIncident: insert with reported_by + reported_at server clock; emits quality.incident.created.
3. addCorrectiveAction: updates corrective_action; if incident_type='accident' AND corrective_action_added_at - incident_date > 24h, set overdue_flag (computed field in view or row column); emits quality.incident.corrective_action_added.
4. verifyIncident: sets verified_by + verified_at; if severity in {critical,major} → optionally escalate to NCR via T-038; emits quality.incident.verified.
5. Background sweep (sql cron or scheduled Server Action) flags overdue accidents nightly; out-of-scope for this task (notify-only stub).
6. Permissions reserved: quality.incident.create, quality.incident.read, quality.incident.add_corrective_action, quality.incident.verify, quality.incident.escalate.

## Files
- apps/web/src/server/quality/incident/actions.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/incident/__tests__/actions.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/src/server/quality/incident/zodSchemas.ts [create]
- packages/rbac/src/permissions.enum.ts [modify]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given reportIncident with incident_type='accident', when called, then row inserted with reported_at=server NOW() and quality.incident.created emits
2. Given an existing accident incident with incident_date=NOW()-25h AND no corrective_action, when addCorrectiveAction(id, text) is called, then corrective_action is set, the overdue flag is true (corrective_action delay > 24h), and quality.incident.corrective_action_added emits with overdue=true
3. Given verifyIncident on severity='critical' with escalateToNcr=true, when called, then verified_by/verified_at are set AND a new NCR is created via T-038 with reference_type set appropriately and linked_ncr_id is updated on the incident row
4. Given the 24h-overdue background sweep stub exists, when run against a fixture of 3 incidents (1 within 24h, 2 overdue), then it returns 2 overdue ids (notify-only stub; actual notification dispatch is out of scope)

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: incident/__tests__/actions.test.ts asserting all 4 ACs before code
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test incident/actions'

## Risk red lines
- 24h is the V-QA-INCIDENT-001 threshold; do not change
- Use server clock for reported_at/verified_at (never client)
- Do not bypass T-038 on escalation (single audit/outbox path)
- Sweep job notifies only — full notification dispatch is Foundation/observability (out of this scope)

pipeline_inputs.description: 3 incident Server Actions (report/addCorrectiveAction/verify) + V-QA-INCIDENT-001 24h-overdue flag + escalateToNcr via T-038 + permissions enum.
pipeline_inputs.details: reportIncident inserts row with reported_at=server NOW(); addCorrectiveAction updates corrective_action and sets overdue_flag computed = (corrective_action_added_at - incident_date > 24h) AND incident_type='accident'; verifyIncident optionally escalates to NCR via T-038 (severity-driven). Background sweep stub flags overdue accidents (notify-only; actual dispatch is Foundation scope). Permissions: quality.incident.create, read, add_corrective_action, verify, escalate.
out_of_scope: Do not implement notification dispatch (Foundation observability scope)
Do not implement actual scheduler/cron — sweep stub returns the overdue list only
